body_transformation: The segmented body now features electric blue bands alternating with vibrant yellow, their surfaces textured with faint glowing circuit patterns that pulse softly. Transparent wings are replaced with taut, electrified membranes that shimmer with neon green energy trails along their edges. The stinger at the rear transforms into a jagged lightning-bolt spine, crackling with contained energy. Facial markings are reimagined as glowing neon green circuit lines etching the white areas, while antennae tip with sparking fur-like filaments.
signature_feature: Spine: jagged lightning-bolt shaped spines with crackling neon green energy and glowing circuit patterns.
